title: Add Aria local sweep tooling and non-record 16MB runs
author: staticplayHub

data.description: Uses a wider/shallower Aria model with reduced key/value heads for the 8x576 configuration.
Added local sweep tooling for fast iteration, including a truncated validation dataset generator and a 3-config local architecture sweep script.

novel_contributions: Added scripts for fast local iteration and architecture sweeps
Added a local dataset truncation tool for quicker validation sweeps
Added an execution checklist for rule-safe iteration and submission packaging
Provided two non-record 16MB submission runs for Aria
Used an 8-layer, 576-dim Aria configuration with 4 KV heads
Packaged submissions under the 16MB cap using int8 quantization plus zlib compression
